caption: In an indoor setting with brick walls and a concrete floor, two individuals work with equipment cases. Initially, a person wearing blue jeans and white sneakers is seen from the waist down, assisting someone else in removing a white protective sheet from a large, blue-trimmed equipment case that contains a flat-screen monitor. As the scene shifts to a wider view of the room, the location is revealed to be a large hall with windows and a dark table. Several yellow equipment cases are lined up along the wall, and a person in a black top and dark pants is seen adjusting one of them. Another person, dressed in white clothing, stands nearby. In the final sequence, the person in white bends over to move one of the blue-trimmed cases, while the person in black crouches beside a yellow case featuring a white logo of a stylized open book.
